basics.name: Alexander Nole
basics.label: Backend Developer | Java & .NET | Microservices | Full Stack Experience
basics.summary: Backend Developer with 1+ year of professional experience building APIs and distributed systems, and over 4 years of independent software development. Specialized in Java (Spring Boot) and .NET, with hands-on experience in microservices architecture, SaaS multitenant systems, and real-time communication. Additionally, experienced in integrating modern frontend technologies such as Next.js and Angular, enabling a strong understanding of end-to-end application flow.
